title: Create English Version of Setup Guides
description: Develop English versions of the setup guides currently available only in Traditional Chinese.

title: Integrate OpenAI Setup with Main Setup Script
description: Incorporate the steps from SETUP-OPENAI.zh-TW.md into the setup-openclaw.sh script for a unified installation process.

title: Add Test Cases for OpenClaw Setup Script
description: Develop and implement test cases to ensure the setup-openclaw.sh script functions correctly on MacBook Air Intel chips.

title: Fix Open Issue #1: Test 1
description: Address and resolve the open issue labeled as Test 1 to ensure project stability.

title: Update CLAUDE.md with Latest Features
description: Revise the CLAUDE.md file to include the latest features and updates in the OpenClaw project.

title: Translate README to Traditional Chinese
description: Create a Traditional Chinese version of the README file to improve accessibility for Chinese-speaking users.

title: Integrate OpenAI Setup Instructions in English
description: Translate and integrate the SETUP-OPENAI.zh-TW.md file into an English version to cater to a broader audience.

title: Create CLAUDE.md Documentation
description: Develop comprehensive documentation for CLAUDE.md to explain its purpose and usage within the project.

title: Test setup-openclaw.sh Script
description: Conduct thorough testing of the setup-openclaw.sh script to ensure it functions correctly on MacBook Air with Intel chips.

title: Complete Test 1 Issue
description: Address and resolve the open issue labeled as Test 1 to ensure project stability and functionality.

title: Add English Version of OLLAMA-INSTALL Guide
description: Translate the OLLAMA-INSTALL.zh-TW.md file to English to make the installation guide accessible to non-Chinese speakers.

title: Document Telegram Integration
description: Create detailed documentation for the tg_integration.txt file to clarify how Telegram integration is implemented in the project.

title: Review and Update SETUP.zh-TW.md
description: Review the existing SETUP.zh-TW.md file for accuracy and update any outdated information to ensure users have the latest setup instructions.

title: Implement Error Logging for Job Auto-Apply
description: Add a comprehensive error logging mechanism to capture and store errors encountered during the job auto-apply process.

title: Enhance Profile Scraper with Additional Filters
description: Introduce additional filtering options for the profile scraper to allow users to filter profiles by job title and years of experience.

title: Optimize Contact Reacher for Connection Request Limits
description: Improve the contact reacher skill to better handle LinkedIn's connection request limits and avoid account restrictions.

title: Update Documentation for New Features
description: Revise the documentation to include recent updates and new features added to the LinkedIn skills.

title: Add Unit Tests for Strategy Agent
description: Develop unit tests for the strategy agent to ensure its scoring and filtering logic is functioning correctly.

title: Fix Bug in Profile Scraper's Country Filter
description: Resolve the issue where the profile scraper fails to filter profiles correctly by country.
acceptance_criteria: The profile scraper correctly filters profiles by the specified country.
Unit tests cover scenarios for filtering profiles by country.
Integration tests confirm that the country filter works in conjunction with other filters (e.g., company, industry).
The bug fix does not introduce any new issues or regressions in the profile scraper functionality.
technical_notes: Investigate the logic within the profile scraper that handles country filtering. Check if the issue is related to incorrect DOM selectors or data parsing errors. Ensure that the Web Structure Agent is correctly identifying and interacting with LinkedIn's DOM elements related to country data. Consider edge cases where country names might have different formats or abbreviations.

title: Implement User Authentication for Skill Access
description: Introduce a user authentication mechanism to restrict access to the LinkedIn skills based on user credentials.

title: Improve UI for On-Page Status Indicators
description: Enhance the visual progress indicators on the LinkedIn job application pages for better user experience.

title: Integrate Email Generator with External Email Services
description: Allow the email generator agent to integrate with external email services for sending emails directly from the application.

title: Conduct Performance Testing for Automation Agent
description: Perform performance testing on the automation agent to identify and resolve potential bottlenecks.

title: Implement Error Logging for Job Auto-Apply
description: Enhance the Job Auto-Apply skill by implementing detailed error logging to capture and analyze failures during job applications.

title: Add Unit Tests for Strategy Agent
description: Develop unit tests for the Strategy Agent to ensure accurate job scoring and filtering based on user preferences.

title: Optimize LinkedIn DOM Selectors
description: Review and optimize DOM selectors used by the Web Structure Agent to improve resilience against LinkedIn's UI changes.

title: Enhance Documentation for Specialized Agents
description: Expand the documentation for each specialized agent to include usage examples and configuration options.

title: Implement Rate Limiting in Automation Agent
description: Introduce rate limiting in the Automation Agent to prevent detection and ensure compliance with LinkedIn's usage policies.

title: Add Language Support for Profile Scraper
description: Extend the Profile Scraper skill to support multiple languages, improving usability for non-English users.

title: Fix Bug in Contact Reacher BFS/DFS Logic
description: Investigate and resolve issues in the BFS/DFS traversal logic of the Contact Reacher skill to improve contact discovery.

title: Create CI/CD Pipeline for Automated Testing
description: Set up a CI/CD pipeline to automate testing and deployment processes, ensuring consistent quality and faster releases.

title: Improve Human-Like Delays in Job Auto-Apply
description: Refine the random delay algorithm in the Job Auto-Apply skill to better mimic human interaction patterns.
